param.value: {Company Name=Kirchhoff Digital Commerce GmbH, Country Code=+49, Email=stefan.elias.kirchhoff.checkout2026@yopmail.com, First Name=Stefan Elias, Last Name=Kirchhoff, Message=We are a Germany-based digital commerce company looking for a dependable checkout solution to improve payment completion, reduce cart abandonment, manage customer transactions more clearly, and support smoother online purchase flows across multiple European markets., Phone Number=15562749381, Selected Product=Simplified Checkout}
